SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.compliance

Class NorsokP002ComplianceChecker

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.compliance.NorsokP002ComplianceChecker
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class NorsokP002ComplianceChecker extends Object implements Serializable
NORSOK P-002 ("Process system design") compliance checker.

Evaluates calculated process values against NORSOK P-002 prescriptive design limits and collects P002Finding objects. The checker is intentionally point-by-point - callers feed it the values from their NeqSim simulation (header Mach numbers, blowdown momentum fluxes, carry-over fractions, etc.) and receive a structured pass/fail report.

Typical limit values used (all configurable via the check... method overloads):

Default P-002 limits
Criterion Limit
Flare-line Mach 0.7
Blowdown ρv² 200 000 kg/(m·s²)
Vent gas velocity 60 m/s
Two-phase erosional ρv² 100 000 kg/(m·s²)
Liquid carry-over 0.001 (0.1 vol%)
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

      machNumber - calculated gas Mach number (dimensionless)
      Returns:
      this checker

      Checks a flare-line segment against a custom Mach number limit.
      Parameters:
      segmentName - segment name
      machNumber - calculated gas Mach number (dimensionless)
      limit - limit (default 0.7)
      Returns:
      this checker

      rhoV2 - ρv² in kg/(m·s²)

      this checker

      limit - limit in m/s (default 60)
      Returns:
      this checker
